steps.t: The item of which Iothete spoke can be found in his home in Dunfast. You should collect the item when you find it.
The item of which Iothete spoke can be found in his home in Dunfast. You should collect the item when you find it.
Iothete is at his small hut hidden in the woods of the northern Whitshaws. You should bring the stone fragment you collected to Iothete as he bid.
